label: 横版提示词
description: 为横版/平台跳跃场景构建背景层、平台和装饰物提示词，保留 16:9、三层 parallax、无可站立背景等关键约束。
description-en: Build prompts for side-scroller backgrounds, platforms and props while preserving 16:9, three-layer parallax and no-standable-background constraints.

inputs.name: layer
inputs.label: 层级
inputs.description: bg_bottom / bg_middle / bg_top / platform / prop / silhouette_top / silhouette_bottom

inputs.name: subject
inputs.label: 具体对象
inputs.description: 平台/道具名；背景层可留空
